title: chassalia longifolia
intro: Chassalia longifolia, also known as the long-leaved Chassalia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chassalia longifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Chassalia longifolia can be consumed as a tea, or used in the form of a decoction, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
